title: MLB season preview: Rankings, playoff odds for all 30 teams as baseball returns
content: Whether your club is the team to beat or hoping to be 2026's biggest surprise, we've got you covered.

title: Brady on comeback: NFL didn't 'like that idea'
content: Tom Brady says he explored the possibility of coming out of retirement and returning to the NFL, adding that the league did not "like that idea very much."

title: LSU works to lure Wade back before firing coach
content: LSU is working to finalize a deal to return Will Wade, the current coach at NC State, who was suspended for the 2019 NCAA tournament while at LSU and later fired amid an NCAA probe that left the program with significant sanctions.

title: Brewers star OF Chourio set to miss 2-4 weeks
content: The Brewers placed star outfielder Chourio on the 10-day injured list on Thursday because of a fractured left hand. The move was made retroactive to Wednesday.

title: QB Simpson says he's 'absolutely' 1st-round pick
content: Ty Simpson felt like he made a final impression at Alabama's pro day in front of NFL scouts. He believes he's 'absolutely' a lock to be a first-round pick.

title: World Series of Poker returning to ESPN in July
content: The World Series of Poker is returning to ESPN for the first time since 2021, with coverage of this year's main event from Las Vegas beginning July 2.

title: Wolves post largest OT comeback on record
content: With a game-closing 15-0 run, the Timberwolves came back from 13 points down for a 110-108 victory over the Rockets on Wednesday night.

title: IOC bans transgender women from Olympics
content: Transgender women athletes are now excluded from the Olympics after the IOC agreed to a new eligibility policy Thursday that aligns with U.S. President Donald Trump's executive order on women's sports ahead of the 2028 Los Angeles Games.

title: Draymond: Hated and loved Wemby's MVP case
content: Warriors forward Draymond Green said he both "hated" and "absolutely loved" the MVP self-promotion from Spurs center Victor Wembanyama.

content: He may have traded right hooks and calf kicks for DJ decks last year, but Israel Adesanya insists he is motivated to continue his UFC career -- starting this weekend against Joe Pyfer.

content: Amid a wave of complaints from F1's four-time world champion Max Verstappen, ESPN's Nate Saunders examines every one and gives his verdict on if they are warranted.

title: From IndyCar royalty to NASCAR dynasty: How Penske conquered American racing
content: Roger Penske's racing enterprises have long been synonymous with IndyCar, but now they've built the most decorated team in recent NASCAR history, too.

content: From tickets to hotels, how expensive is this summer's big event? Let's find out -- through the eyes of a USMNT fan on the trip of a lifetime.

title: World Cup playoff preview, predictions: Who will book the final six spots?
content: The final six spots -- four from Europe and two from the intercontinental playoff -- will be clinched this week.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal in for PSG star Kvaratskhelia
content: Arsenal are exploring an approach for Paris Saint-Germain winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. Transfer Talk has the latest.

content: The participation of External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar in the G7 meetings signified “the importance France attaches to closely associating India — currently holding the BRICS presidency — with its G7 presidency”, the French government said

title: 15 women professionals term menstrual leave policy ‘benevolent sexism’, move Karnataka High Court
content: Petitioners claim that the policy creates a competitive disadvantage for women in hiring and promotions, discourages employers from placing women in leadership roles, and infringes upon privacy by compelling disclosure of menstrual cycles

title: India has oil stocks for 60 days, LPG supplies for one month: Govt.
content: The Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas said all petrol pumps across the country are adequately stocked and operating normally, with no rationing of petrol or diesel

content: Electronic Seizure Management System (ESMS) was activated on February 26; SDPI pulls out of Manjeswaram contest, easing vote-split concerns for UDF

title: Trinamool Congress worker shot dead in Kolkata ahead of the polls; four arrested
content: Tensions also rose in South 24 Parganas Basanti area where a BJP campaign rally was allegedly attacked by local Trinamool workers

title: Derogatory remarks against women: TVK chief Vijay seeks action against Kalam’s former advisor Ponraj
content: Mr. Vijay visits the DGP office to submit a petition demanding action against Mr. Ponraj for speaking against women who support TVK

title: KPCC delegation fails to placate rebel candidate Sadiq Pahilwan
content: Last minute efforts by KPCC Working President Saleem Ahmed and MLA Rizwan Arshad to placate him fail miserably in Davangere

title: In a first, multi-layered security and holding areas introduced at M. Chinnaswamy Stadium
content: On Thursday, the State Expert Committee overseeing the overhaul of the stadium conducted a final drill and formally announced that the venue has undergone all upgrades satisfactorily

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Detailed break-up of voter roll published
content: Kerala has 2,71,42,952 voters including 1,39,21,868 women, 1,32,20,811 men and 273 transgender voters for the 2026 elections

title: Within a year of getting powers, MHA agency issued 290 takedown notices a day on average for online content
content: According to MHA report for 2024-25, till March 31, 2025, 1,11,185 suspicious online content has been blocked under Section 79(3)(b) of IT Act. On March 13, 2024, the Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre was designated as the MHA’s agency to perform the functions under Section 79 (3) (b) of IT Act.

title: Karnataka bypolls: 16 candidates withdraw, 34 in fray including two Cong. rebels
content: A total of 16 candidates, including 11 from Davangere South constituency and five from Bagalkot Assembly constituency withdrew their nominations before the deadline on Thursday

title: Bus-truck collision in Markapuram highlights: Death toll rises to 14; bus infernos highlight regulatory gaps, trigger safety review
content: The death toll and the injured details were confirmed with The Hindu by the Markapuram district incharge Collector P. Raja Babu.

title: Cabinet nod for 50% waiver of property tax arrears in Andhra Pradesh
content: The one-time benefit can be availed on payment of the amount in lump sum by March 31, says I&PR Minister

title: Transgender community members crowdfund to send group to national capital
content: A six-member group from Kerala is in New Delhi to voice their protest against the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill and coordinate with other protesting groups

title: Markapuram bus fire: ₹7 lakh ex gratia for deceased, 2.5 lakh for injured
content: Modi announces ex gratia of ₹2 lakh each for deceased while the A.P. governemnt announces ₹5 lakh each; injured to get ₹2 lakh each from State government and ₹50,000 each from the Centre

title: Karnataka govt. released grants to engineering colleges of private universities in violation of rules: CAG report
content: BVBCET, Hubballi, and SJCE, Mysuru — despite their affiliation to private universities — received govt. grants

title: Cabinet to promote use of PNG, targets to give 10 lakh connections in Andhra Pradesh
content: Approvals for laying PNG pipelines will be granted in 24 hours, or processed automatically, says Civil Supplies Minister Nadendla Manohar, while asserting that there is no shortage of petrol, diesel, or LPG in the State

title: Kerala Assembly Polls 2026: Welfare Party declares support for UDF ahead of elections
content: Sangh Parivar seeks to maintain a favourable social atmosphere for its progress in the State by keeping the Left in power, and the WPI strives to keep such forces at bay, according to the party

title: Over 8,000 complaints on MCC violations received through cVIGIL app in Kozhikode
content: The app, available for download from the Election Commission of India’s web platform, allows users to upload real-time photographs, short video clips, and audio recordings as evidence

title: Karnataka govt. announces 60-day age relaxation for 2026-27 class 1 admission
content: Under existing rules, a child must be six years old by June 1 of the academic year to be eligible for class 1

title: Minister Narayana launches Legislative Assembly central hall piling works in Amaravati
content: It comprises four blocks and the architectural design of the building reflects the rich cultural heritage of Andhra Pradesh, he says

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: 890 candidates in the fray in Kerala as deadline for withdrawal of nominations ends
content: Koduvally has the highest number of candidates, 13, followed by Manjeswaram, Peravur and Thiruvananthapuram with 11 candidates each

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Touted as cement hub, but for Ariyalur constituency voters the future appears grey
content: Residents, who blame successive governments for failing to invest adequately and prioritise the district, feel that the constituency would have changed to a great extent if it had high-profile leaders

content:

title: Hongirana’s play Pen wins the hearts of theatre-lovers in Shivamogga
content: The play is structured as an interview with a poet, cleverly drawing inspiration from popular television interview formats

title: NHRC takes suo motu cognisance of 16 milk adulteration deaths in Rajamahendravaram
content: It serves notices on the Chief Secretary and the Director General of Police seeking a report on the matter within two weeks

title: BJP got highest donations in 2024-25, over 10 times all other national parties combined: ADR report
content: The report focuses on donations above ₹20,000 received by the national political parties during 2024-25, as per details submitted to the Election Commission

title: Long queues seen at fuel pumps in Madhya Pradesh districts; Minister denies shortage
content: Several videos surfaced online showing long vehicle queues in various districts like Indore, Ujjain, Mandsaur, Shajapur and Jhabua

title: Mines, missiles, & mountains: Why reopening Strait of Hormuz is no easy task
content: The Strait of Hormuz, a critical global oil route, is currently blocked by Iran. This action follows a US-Israel offensive and the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Iran has created a tense maritime chokehold, impacting global oil prices. While diplomatic talks are ongoing, reopening the strait presents significant geographical and military challenges.

title: Shubman Gill joins criticism of Impact Player rule, says ‘It takes the skill out’
content: Gujarat Titans captain Shubman Gill has voiced concerns about the IPL Impact Player rule. He believes it reduces the skill element in cricket. Several other Indian players share similar sentiments. The rule allows an extra player, impacting the traditional balance of the game. Gill feels it makes matches more predictable. The rule is set to continue until 2027.

title: CEO of America's largest bank reveals one work-from-home trend he didn't notice earlier
content: JP Morgan CEO Jamie Dimon criticizes remote work, citing a lack of attentiveness in virtual meetings and its detrimental impact on young employees' learning and emotional intelligence. He argues that in-office presence is crucial for skill development and project ownership, contrasting it with the 'game playing' and reduced accountability he observes in remote setups.

title: IPL 2026: Another setback for RCB as star pacer ruled out after Josh Hazlewood
content: Sri Lankan pacer Nuwan Thushara will miss the Indian Premier League. Sri Lanka Cricket denied him a No Objection Certificate. This follows a new strict fitness policy. Players must meet new physical benchmarks for overseas leagues. Thushara reportedly fell short of these standards. This could cost him his contract with Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 8: Ranveer Singh film eyes 'Dhurandhar 1' record of Rs 840
content: As Aditya Dhar’s espionage masterpiece Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge enters its eighth day on Thursday, March 26, 2026, the Ranveer Singh starrer is rewriting the history of Indian cinema. Having already shattered the Rs. 1,000 crore worldwide milestone in record time, the film is now tracking at nearly double the efficiency of previous blockbusters like 'Jawan', 'Pathaan', and 'Animal.' Despite its sprawling 3-hour and 49-minute runtime, the sequel's domestic net collection has surged to more than Rs. 630 crore, fueled by unprecedented demand for midnight screenings and a gripping narrative that sees Jaskirat Singh Rangi, played by Ranveer Singh deeper than ever into the Karachi underworld as Hamza Ali Mazari.

title: US-Iran war impact: India’s crude imports from Russia near all-time high
content: The inflows of Russian crude oil have risen sharply since the US-Iran war began and imports via the Strait of Hormuz were disrupted. In fact, crude imports from Russia are now nearing lifetime monthly highs!

title: Get rid of old assumptions: Microsoft HR makes it clear to employees that it's time to change
content: Microsoft's Chief People Officer Amy Coleman announced a significant HR restructuring, prioritizing adaptability and speed for the AI era. This shakeup includes leadership changes and new teams focused on accelerating HR operations, employee experience, and workforce skilling. The move signals a shift towards agility and a faster pace for the tech giant.

title: PM Modi to attend G7 summit in France from June 15-17, focus on global economy & Hormuz
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is set to attend the G7 summit in France from June 15-17. This confirmation came during high-level talks where India's crucial role in addressing global economic issues and fostering solidarity was highlighted. Discussions also centered on the Middle East, with both nations agreeing to coordinate on securing the vital Strai of Hormuz.

title: Carolina Marin, one of badminton’s greatest, retires at 32
content: Carolina Marin has retired from professional badminton due to recurring injuries, opting out of the European Championships despite a wild card. The Olympic champion said she didn’t want to risk her body for a final match. Marin bows out with an illustrious career, including Olympic gold and three world titles, and now looks ahead to a new chapter.

title: Meta is rebranding employee titles and roles: What the company told staff in memo
content: Meta's Reality Labs is undergoing a significant internal overhaul, rebranding employees as 'AI builders' and forming smaller, AI-focused teams. This strategic shift aims to boost engineering productivity and product quality, with CEO Mark Zuckerberg envisioning AI dramatically altering work by 2026.  These new 'AI pods' will foster cross-functional collaboration, with dedicated leads managing operations and performance.

title: IOC bans transgender women from LA 2028 Olympics
content: The IOC will bar transgender women from women’s Olympic events starting 2028, allowing only biological females with a one-time gene test. The move aims to ensure fairness, citing physical advantages linked to male biology. Backed by president Kirsty Coventry, the policy also impacts some DSD athletes and is expected to draw criticism despite calls for uniform global rules.

title: Aamir Khan opens up on Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' success
content: Aamir Khan extended his best wishes to the team of Aditya Dhar's spy drama "Dhurandhar: The Revenge" for its box office success. Speaking at the International Film Festival of Delhi 2026, Khan, who was present for a screening of his film "Sitaare Zameen Par," noted the widespread praise for "Dhurandhar 2" and its predecessor.

title: Gulf crisis: One Indian killed, another injured in Abu Dhabi after missile debris falls
content: Tragedy struck Abu Dhabi as debris from an intercepted ballistic missile claimed the lives of two individuals, including an Indian national, with another Indian citizen sustaining injuries. The incident occurred after UAE air defence systems successfully neutralized incoming threats from Iran. Authorities are urging the public to rely solely on official information as the wider toll from ongoing attacks rises.

title: 'None of us are satisfied': India women's footballer Basfore | Exclusive
content: India’s women’s football team had to endure a disappointing 2026 AFC Women’s Asian Cup campaign, losing all three matches in the competition. In an exclusive interview, midfielder Sangita Basfore reflected on missed opportunities, limited preparation time, and tactical instability, while urging improved grassroots development and longer domestic leagues to strengthen future performances.

title: Why this country is preparing for war against US amid Iran conflict
content: European allies secretly prepared to defend Greenland from a potential US military action. Denmark, with support from France, Germany, Norway, and Sweden, planned to disable airport runways. This move signaled deep concerns over President Trump's intentions. The preparations aimed to deter any US intervention. The episode highlighted a growing trust deficit between the US and its allies.

title: Medical student dies by suicide near Dehradun college; father blames HoD for harassment
content: A medical student in Dehradun died by suicide, with her father alleging harassment by her Head of Department. The student, a Master of Surgery candidate, was reportedly forced to sever ties with her thesis guide, leading to academic repercussions. The institute, however, stated the student had a history of mental illness and had attempted suicide previously, with her parents' awareness.

title: Mines, missiles and traps: How Iran is preparing to fend off US invasion of Kharg Island
content: Iran is fortifying Kharg Island with troops and air defence systems as the US reportedly considers a risky operation to seize the vital oil hub. While the Trump administration weighs this pressure tactic, experts warn of significant casualties and potential Iranian retaliation. Allies urge caution, advocating for a focus on Iran's missile program instead of ground invasions.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' week 1 box office round-up: Film breaks records, inches towards Rs 800cr
content: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has shattered box office records, surpassing its predecessor and becoming a juggernaut. The film has achieved unprecedented success, crossing Rs 654.03 crore net in India by Thursday evening and beating 'Pushpa 2's' worldwide collection. It has set new benchmarks, including the biggest paid previews and opening day in Hindi cinema history.

title: Your favourite internet story of 7 dogs returning home isn't true - it's not fake either
content: Much like Yudhisthira’s white lie, the tale of the seven dogs returning home — a viral video the internet fell in love with — is only partially true. The video is not AI; it is not fake, but the narrative is.

title: How to download Minecraft Bedrock 26.20.22 beta version
content: Minecraft Bedrock's 26.20.22 beta and preview, released March 25, 2026, offers early access to new features. Players can download this version on Xbox, PlayStation, Android, iOS, and Windows PC to test upcoming content.  Instructions are provided for each platform, emphasizing authorized downloads to ensure safety and a smooth testing experience.

title: IPL 2026: BCCI reveals full second phase schedule - Check out
content: The IPL 2026 season resumes on April 13, with the Board of Control for Cricket in India unveiling the schedule for the remaining 50 league matches. The tournament will span across 12 Indian venues until May 24, featuring eight double-headers. This revised plan ensures the league progresses despite earlier election date uncertainties, with no reduction in matches planned.

title: 'Can't stand in queues': K'taka MLA demands free IPL tickets; Speaker orders VIP passes
content: A Karnataka MLA sparked a controversy by alleging that legislators are denied "entitled" IPL passes, forced into queues, and face inflated ticket prices due to alleged black marketing by KSCA. The Assembly Speaker has now directed the government to ensure MLAs receive VIP tickets, addressing concerns of disrespect and indignity.

title: IPL 2026: LSG owner Sanjiv Goenka breaks silence on Pant captaincy ‘speculations’
content: Lucknow Super Giants owner Sanjiv Goenka has ended rumors about Rishabh Pant's captaincy for IPL 2026. Goenka publicly backed Pant, calling the speculation baseless. Pant faced criticism after a disappointing IPL 2025 season. The team begins its IPL 2026 campaign against Delhi Capitals on April 1. Pant's performance will be closely watched.

title: Maya Angelou quote: Change what you don’t like or change your mindset
content: Maya Angelou, renowned poet and activist, advocated for proactive change and mental adaptability. Her philosophy, exemplified by a famous quote, encourages taking initiative to alter disliked situations. If direct change is impossible, she advises shifting one's perspective to discover new solutions and foster resilience.

title: Danielle Collins stuns fans with bold post after Moutet DM row
content: American tennis star Danielle Collins has grabbed attention again, this time for her stunning beach look in Miami. Just days after being involved in a social media controversy, the former Australian Open finalist shared photos of herself enjoying the sun in a stylish bikini. Fans flooded the comments section with compliments, calling her look bold and glamorous as she continued to enjoy her time in the city.

title: 'Prove me wrong': Ex-India batter throws challenge to Rahane ahead of IPL 2026
content: Aakash Chopra believes Ajinkya Rahane has a point to prove in IPL 2026, particularly regarding his post-powerplay scoring, despite a strong IPL 2025. Chopra also highlighted Rinku Singh's potential as a future captain and urged Varun Chakaravarthy to regain his wicket-taking form after a dip in the T20 World Cup.

title: 'Some hope to profit from discord': Envoy flags 'China threat' hype in India
content: Chinese Ambassador Xu Feihong urged Indian youth to adopt objective views, cautioning against narratives amplifying a "Beijing threat." He emphasized the mutual benefit of partnership and encouraged more cultural exchanges to foster a balanced perception between the two nations.

title: Man ends life after apology video at police station goes viral
content: A man died by suicide in Rajasthan's Balotra district, with his family alleging harassment by usurers. The creditors reportedly recorded and viralized an apology video of the deceased on police station premises, despite a consensus on repayment being reached. Two accused have been detained.

title: 'Have 60-day stock of oil': Govt dismisses with 'disdain' reports of depleted reserves
content: India's fuel supply remains stable and secure. The government assures citizens that petrol, diesel, and LPG are readily available nationwide. Officials are combating a misinformation campaign designed to create panic. Strategic reserves are robust, covering approximately 60 days of supply. Domestic production and imports ensure continuous availability of essential fuels.

title: Donations to national parties surged 161% in FY25, BJP got lion's share
content: The BJP received over 91% of declared donations above Rs 20,000 by national parties in FY25, totaling Rs 6,074 crore. Overall political funding surged 161% to Rs 6,648 crore, with corporate donations dominating. The BJP's collections alone jumped 171% from the previous fiscal year.

title: Nayara Energy hikes petrol prices by Rs 5, diesel by Rs 3 amid Middle East crisis
content: Nayara Energy has increased petrol and diesel prices. This move comes as global oil prices climb due to the Middle East crisis. Other fuel retailers are taking different approaches. Some are absorbing losses, while state-run companies have kept standard fuel prices unchanged since April 2022. Premium petrol prices have risen.

title: 'Don't ask about Pakistan cricket': Irritated Afridi shushes media - Watch
content: Shaheen Shah Afridi drew attention at a PSL 2026 event by avoiding questions on Pakistan’s poor international form, asking reporters to focus only on the league. In a viral moment, he said, “Don’t ask about Pakistan… ask questions on PSL only.” The incident comes amid criticism after Pakistan’s early T20 World Cup exit, while Lahore Qalandars prepare to start their title defence.

title: New flight ticket refund & cancellation rules effective today: How will passengers benefit?
content: The change in refund rules underlines the ‘minimum requirements for refund of ticket’. This includes tickets for both domestic and international travel, booked with domestic and international airlines operating to and from India.

content: The war in the Middle East began when the US and Israel conducted strikes on Iran, killing Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and other senior leaders.

title: 10 Fall Ill After Having Momos In Greater Noida, Food Poisoning Suspected
content: Ten members of a single family from the Nai Abadi locality fell ill after ordering the food for a family gathering.

title: Navi Mumbai Airport To Connect 46 Domestic Destinations From April
content: One of India's largest greenfield airports, the Navi Mumbai International Airport (NMIA) will connect 30 new domestic routes across key Indian cities from April.

title: "Just In Case Enemies Appear": Belarus President Gifts Rifle To Kim Jong Un
content: Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko gifted Kim Jong Un an automatic rifle during his maiden visit to Pyongyang, joking that the North Korean leader may need it "in case enemies appear", state media said Thursday.

title: Foreign Ministry Secretary P Kumaran Appointed As India's Envoy To UK
content: New Delhi, March 26 (IANS) Periasamy Kumaran, presently Secretary (East) in the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), has been appointed as India's next High Commissioner to the United Kingdom, the MEA announced on Thursday.

title: Opinion: Is The Dreaded 'Dahiya Doctrine' Guiding Israeli Actions In Iran, Gaza, Lebanon?
content: At the core of the doctrine is the idea of using overwhelming, often disproportionate force in areas where 'hostile groups' operate.

title: Adani Partners Youth4Jobs For Global Ability Photography Challenge 2026
content: Ahmedabad, March 26 (IANS) NotJustArt, a Youth4Jobs venture, on Thursday partnered with Adani GreenXTalks to launch the fifth edition of the Global Ability Photography Challenge (GAPC) 2026, a global photography competition dedicated exclusively to p

title: LuLu Group Chairman Briefs PM Modi On Uninterrupted Food Supplies To Gulf Region
content: He briefed the prime minister on LuLu Group's recent initiatives aimed at supporting food security across its GCC markets.

title: No Shortage, India's Energy Supply Secure For "Many Months": Centre
content: The Centre said India has 74 days of total reserve capacity and around 60 days of actual stock cover.

title: Is Russia Secretly Helping Iran With Drones, Food, Data? Kremlin Denies
content: Citing Western intelligence assessments, the report said that Moscow began sending the drones to Tehran this month and is set to complete the phased shipment of the equipment by the end of the month.

title: Bengaluru Woman, Brother Stabbed To Death By Minor Son Of Husband's Lover
content: A woman and her brother were allegedly stabbed to death by a minor following a dispute linked to an alleged relationship, police said. The incident took place under the Peenya police station limits in Bengaluru.

title: Afghanistan-Pakistan Cross Border Clashes Resume After Eid Ceasefire Ends

title: 'Changing of the guard': Cole Hutson poised to take big role in next wave for the Capitals
content: the 19-year-old defenseman was days out from signing his three-year, entry-level contract with the Washington Capitals . he surprised Hughes with his strength, prompting a frustrated rebuttal by Hughes via cross-check to the ice . it's early yet, but the message from Hutson was clear: this NHL stage wasn't intimidating the teen .

title: UCLA coach Kelly Inouye-Perez breaking records amid changing landscape
content: Kelly Inouye-Perez is the all-time winningest coach in the history of the division I softball program . in her 20th year as head coach, she added the record to a list of accomplishments . "we are so much more than wins," she says .

title: Bilas' path to the men's Final Four for every Sweet 16 team

title: Nick Lodolo, Kirby Yates to start season on IL
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . the Milwaukee Brewers will start the 2026 season shorthanded . pitcher Chourio has been diagnosed with a small hairline fracture and will miss the first 2-4 weeks .

title: Ranking the 25 best players in the women's Sweet 16
content: the top 25 players in the 2026 women's NCAA tournament are eliminated . five players on our pre-March Madness list now eliminated with their teams . the rankings take into account the players' seasonlong statistics but also weigh their early-round NCAA tournament performances .

title: Saudi Pro League, MLS or elsewhere: Where could Salah go next?
content: Mohamed Salah is leaving Liverpool at the end of the season after nine years . he joined the club in 2016 when they were still enduring their long wait for a league title . his impact on Liverpool can hardly be overstated, but where could Salah head next?

title: NHL playoff watch: Who will win the Pacific Division 'pillow fight'?
content: the 2025-26 Pacific division will qualify at least three teams for the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs . the playoffs will take place on friday . it's the second time in a three-day stretch that the teams went winless with six in action .

title: Which teams, coaches and players have the most to prove in 2026?
content: the offseason is a time of hope for all sports fans . this year, everyone's favorite team will right its ship, reach its potential . we think about those with expectations that things can be better, that things better get better .

title: Everything you need for Opening Day: What we're watching, lineups and updates from every game
content: the 2026 season has arrived, starting with a 7-0 blowout victory over the San Francisco Giants on Wednesday night . we'll post lineups as they are announced and live updates throughout, followed by takeaways after every final pitch . here's our takeaway from the Yankees-Giants opener and a pregame look at what you need to know .
